Here's a summary of the relevant Python remote jobs I found:

---

**3 relevant remote jobs found for skills: Python**

1. **Senior Full-stack React Developer** — Lemon.io (marketplace)
   - 🌍 Remote worldwide (Americas, Europe, Asia, Oceania)
   - Python listed in tech stack, full-stack role
   - https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/software-development/senior-full-stack-react-developer-2088711

2. **Senior DevOps Engineer** — Lemon.io (marketplace)
   - 🌍 Remote worldwide (Americas, Europe, Asia, Oceania)
   - Python listed in tech stack, DevOps/cloud role
   - https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/devops/senior-devops-engineer-2090002

3. **AI Engineer** — Dry Ground AI
   - 🌍 Remote (Brazil, Colombia, Philippines — $40-60k/yr)
   - Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, NLP, AI/ML focus
   - https://remotive.com/remote-jobs/artificial-intelligence/ai-engineer-2089958

**Note:** The Lemon.io roles are marketplace-based (connecting you with startups) and don't disclose salary upfront. The AI Engineer role at Dry Ground AI is the most directly Python-focused with clear AI/ML responsibilities.
